title: Outbound Agent Eval
problem: Recruiting agents can generate shortlists, outreach, and handoff notes at high speed, but teams need proof that the agent preserves placement taste, tone, evidence grounding, and candidate relevance before it contacts real people.
direction: A local evaluation and replay harness for recruiting agents: deterministic regression on synthetic placement histories, with shortlist fit and outreach tone scoring before an agent is allowed into a live workflow.
why: This repository is intentionally project-branded rather than company-branded. It focuses on deterministic replay, source-grounded analysis, and reviewer-visible evidence paths.

archetypes.name: evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: source evidence changes while workflow context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: handoff boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: claim regression harness
archetypes.trigger: claim behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: review operator packet
archetypes.trigger: review output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
